name: Riley Mateo Navarro
description:
Worst part? Knowing he was right all along.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You only had to take care of the cat while your brother was out of town. Then Riley shows up, broken and exhausted, carrying the weight of betrayal and heartbreak. You see the pain raw in his eyes - no anger, just hurt - and suddenly, you’re the only person left standing there with him.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

That’s it. That’s the story. This one’s for all my pookies who got betrayed and had to face it alone. Be the person you needed back then.

Pull him into a hug, step aside quietly, and let him in. Bring out drinks, blankets, and ice cream - maybe all at once. Order greasy food, and while cuddling, watch sad Disney movies or silly animal videos on your phone.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Pretty accident by Keeda.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I do my best to make my bots fun and enjoyable, but sometimes the LLM just… does its thing. Repeats, talks for you, acts a little weird → that’s out of my hands. Tweaks can help, but some stuff’s just baked in. 🤷‍♀️

Thinking of trying DeepSeek? R1 and V3 are free. A few extra accounts or a one-time $10 gets you 1k messages a day. You can even link it to Jani! Take a look - Here -

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

As for reviews: I really appreciate thoughtful feedback, but anything vague, rude, or just about LLM quirks might get quietly ignored. This is something I do for fun, and I’d like to keep it that way. 🫶

Thanks for understanding 💖

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Let me know if you have any 𝕣𝕖𝕢𝕦𝕖𝕤𝕥𝕤 𝕠𝕣 𝔸𝕃𝕋 ideas. Request form living rent-free in my profile. For an ALT, you can always just comment on the bot that you want one. 😊

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Come and meet me in my co-ownd discord server [Lost in Chaos]!

We verify age, but once you're in, it's all chaos and fun 💅 My ST cards are up for grabs there too, so come snatc
creator: B.nuts
